title: McGill Financial Asset Management Hackathon
summary: QUARCC swept the podium at the Inter-University Quant Hackathon, defeating 18 teams across 6 universities.
detail:
Our team of four built a fully automated market-making strategy in under 24 hours, leveraging mean-reversion signals and real-time order book imbalance. The judges praised the implementation's Sharpe ratio of 3.2 and its clean, modular codebase.

The competition required teams to deploy live on a simulated exchange with latency penalties, adding an infrastructure challenge on top of the quant problem. QUARCC's entry stood out for both performance and presentation clarity.

This victory marks QUARCC's first first-place finish at an inter-university hackathon and earns us an invitation to the national finals in the spring.
